title: Login Issues: Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still...

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is...

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13.

title: Password Reset Email Not Sent
description: Users are reporting they are not receiving the recovery emails even after checking spam folders.

title: UI Glitch in Dashboard
description: The sidebar overlaps with the main content on smaller screen resolutions (1366x768).

title: Payment Gateway Timeout
description: Customers are getting a 504 error when attempting to process credit card payments.

title: Slow Page Load Times
description: The reports page takes more than 10 seconds to load for accounts with large datasets.

title: Broken Link in Help Center
description: The 'Contact Support' link in the footer leads to a 404 page.

title: Missing Export Data Feature
description: Requested feature: Users want to export their ticket history into a CSV file format.

title: Email Notifications Lagging
description: System alerts are arriving 30 to 45 minutes after the event actually occurred.

title: Database Connection Error
description: Recurring 'Connection Lost' errors during peak hours of 2 PM to 4 PM EST.

title: Search Bar No Results
description: Searching for exact ticket IDs often returns 'No Results Found' even when the ID exists.

title: Dark Mode Contrast Issues
description: In dark mode, the secondary text is too dark and almost unreadable against the background.

title: Profile Picture Upload Fail
description: Users receive an 'Invalid File Type' error even when uploading JPG or PNG images under 2MB.

title: API Key Generation Error
description: Developers cannot generate new API keys from the settings panel. Returns a 500 server error.
